rules: Weekly review starts only after profile links, public post URLs, and minimum KPI source checks are complete.
If empty data mode is active, keep all commerce and prioritization decisions on HOLD.
Do not rank guardians, change offer order, increase paid CTA, or prioritize Luna/affiliate from zero or missing data.
Use weekly summary, week decision gate, and decision readiness checklist as the decision source of truth.
Lead and offer work requires repeated route or lead demand, not template rows or one-off clicks.

actions.operator_action: Confirm all platform profile links are set/live before using first-batch posts for weekly review.
actions.evidence_required: profile_configured=3 and profile gate ready before publish/review.
actions.decision_boundary: Without profile links, do not treat missing clicks as content failure.

actions.operator_action: Publish or verify the first YouTube Shorts post and record the real public post URL.
actions.evidence_required: Three real platform post_url values, not placeholders.
actions.decision_boundary: No public URL means no weekly decision.

actions.operator_action: Backfill site_clicks, quiz_starts and quiz_completions for each published first-batch post.
actions.evidence_required: Each 0 value has a checked platform or site source, not an assumption.
actions.decision_boundary: Zero without source is still unknown.

actions.operator_action: Run the weekly decision evidence checklist and require all evidence rows to complete before ranking content.
actions.decision_boundary: Pending evidence keeps all commerce and winner decisions on HOLD.

actions.operator_action: Regenerate weekly summary, decision gate and review packet before changing the next content batch.
actions.command: python3 tools/promotion_weekly_summary.py && python3 tools/promotion_week_decision_gate.py && python3 tools/promotion_weekly_review_packet.py
actions.decision_boundary: Empty data mode allows only setup, publish, and KPI backfill actions.

actions.operator_action: Check lead demand before building owned assets, Luna packs or paid offer experiments.
actions.decision_boundary: No repeated lead demand means no paid or priority offer build.

actions.operator_action: Use week-decision-gate as the only source of truth for allowed next decisions.
actions.decision_boundary: Do not alter offer order, guardian priority, Luna emphasis, or affiliate weighting unless gate allows it.

evidence.expected_value: All active platform profile links are set/live with traceable evidence.
evidence.evidence_note: 啟用平台 profile 尚未全部 set/live。

evidence.expected_value: First-batch posts are published on all active platforms.
Every public post URL has platform domain, public view, CTA, UTM, and proof evidence checked.
Zero values for site_clicks, quiz_starts, and quiz_completions have checked-source proof.
evidence.evidence_note: 核心 KPI 仍未發布、未回填，或 0 值缺來源證據。
weekly review 尚未達可決策狀態。

evidence.expected_value: Empty data mode is false before commerce or prioritization decisions.
Week decision gate allows at least weeklyDecision before changing content or commerce paths.
evidence.evidence_note: week decision gate 仍是 HOLD。

evidence.expected_value: Paid CTA, Luna emphasis, affiliate emphasis, and offer order remain blocked until intent exists.
